top_signals.title: U.S. Treasurys are now firmly in the 'danger zone,' strategists say
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasurys are in a "danger zone" as surging long-term yields raise fears that sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities, strategists said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: BDO picks US audit leader for senior partner role
top_signals.summary: Mid-tier advisory firm BDO’s equity partners have voted to name Iain Henderson as the firm’s next senior partner. Henderson will take office on 1 October 2026, succeeding Matthew White, who will have completed his maximum of two four-year terms in the senior leadership role. Unlike the role of managing partner, the senior partner oversees the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
